resources.name: EC-OPS
resources.description:
E-Commerce Order Processing System.

Getting started:
1. Select the 'EC-OPS Local' sub-environment.
2. Run Auth › Login — baseUrl defaults to http://localhost:8002.
3. The {{ token }} variable is saved automatically.

resources.name: Create an order via natural language
Get a specific order by ID — paste real ID
Submit a task — returns 202 immediately with a task ID
Poll task status — paste task ID from response above
Register a new user — returns 201 with user object
Login — returns { "access_token": "...", "token_type": "bearer" }
Login — wrong password → 401

params.name: password
params.value:
wrongpassword


# ── Test token ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Copy the access_token value from the login response above,
# paste it below, then run any request in orders.http / agent.http.

@token = PASTE_ACCESS_TOKEN_HERE

resources.name: Create order — high quantity, decimal price
Get order by ID — paste an id from a create response above
Cancel a PENDING order — paste a PENDING order id
Verify the cancelled order is retained with status CANCELLED
Step 1.3 — Confirm it appears in PENDING list
Step 1.4 — Cancel it (soft-delete — sets status to CANCELLED)
Step 1.5 — Verify it is retained with status CANCELLED (200, not 404)
Step 1.6 — Confirm it no longer appears in PENDING list
Step 1.7 — Confirm it appears in CANCELLED list
Step 2.4 — List all orders (should include A, B, C as PENDING)
Step 3.1 — Create order to be promoted
Step 3.2 — After 5 min, verify it is now PROCESSING
Step 3.3 — Attempt to cancel a PROCESSING order → expect 409
Step 4.1 — Ask agent to create order
Step 4.2 — Confirm via REST — should appear in PENDING list
Step 4.3 — Get the order Grace placed (copy id from PENDING list)
Step 5.3 — Poll again after a few seconds (should be completed)
Step 5.4 — Verify the order was created via REST
Step 6.1 — Order with a free item (price = 0.00, allowed by ge=0)
Step 6.3 — Large quantity, low unit price
then paste that order ID here.
Wrong username at login → 401
